summary: Comprehensive testing of 5 NEW features for IDSEA: (1) Certificate PDF Generation, (2) Excel/PDF Member Export, (3) SMTP Email Settings, (4) File Upload, (5) Advanced Reports with Recharts. All 24 backend tests pass. All frontend UI components verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed MongoDB _id leak in POST /api/admin/certificates/generate endpoint - was causing 500 error
All 5 new features fully functional with proper data-testid attributes
SMTP email sending is in DEMO mode - settings are saved to DB but no real emails sent without valid SMTP credentials
seed_data_creation: Tests created certificates for existing members during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: 5 NEW features fully tested: (1) Certificate PDF download from /api/admin/certificates/{id}/pdf, (2) Member export at /api/admin/members/export/excel and /pdf, (3) SMTP settings CRUD at /api/admin/smtp-settings, (4) File upload at /api/upload with serve at /api/uploads/{filename}, (5) Monthly growth data at /api/admin/reports/monthly-growth for Recharts. FileUpload component integrated in Members, Gallery, Events, Publications admin pages.

certificate_pdf_generation.backend: POST /api/admin/certificates/generate creates cert, GET /api/admin/certificates/{id}/pdf returns valid PDF
certificate_pdf_generation.frontend: 12 PDF download buttons on Certificates page, Generate Certificate modal works

member_export.backend: GET /api/admin/members/export/excel returns .xlsx, GET /api/admin/members/export/pdf returns PDF. Both support ?status=approved and ?membership_type=academic filters
member_export.frontend: Excel and PDF export buttons present on Members page

smtp_settings.backend: GET, PUT /api/admin/smtp-settings, POST /api/admin/smtp-settings/test all working. Settings saved to DB
smtp_settings.frontend: SMTP Settings panel with host, port, user, password, from_email fields. Save Settings and Send Test Email buttons present
smtp_settings.note: MOCKED - SMTP email delivery is in demo mode. Settings are saved but no real emails sent without valid SMTP credentials

file_upload.backend: POST /api/upload accepts images and PDFs, rejects .txt files. GET /api/uploads/{filename} serves files
file_upload.frontend: FileUpload component (data-testid='file-upload-zone') present in: Members modal (photo), Gallery album/photo modals, Events modal (brochure + image), Publications modal (PDF)

advanced_reports.backend: GET /api/admin/reports/monthly-growth returns member_growth, revenue_growth, type_distribution, status_distribution, state_distribution
advanced_reports.frontend: Reports page shows: 6 stat cards, Member Growth bar chart, Membership Type Distribution pie chart, Revenue line chart, Member Status Distribution donut chart, Members by State horizontal bar chart. Recharts v3.8.0 rendering correctly

mocked_apis_list: SMTP email delivery - settings saved to DB but no real emails sent without valid SMTP credentials. This is expected behavior.

bug_fixed.root_cause: MongoDB ObjectId (_id) was being included in the response after insert_one(), causing JSON serialization to fail
bug_fixed.fix: Added certificate.pop('_id', None) before returning the certificate dict

frontend_tests: Admin Reports page: 6 stat cards displaying correctly
Admin Reports page: Member Growth bar chart renders (7 recharts-bar-rectangle elements)
Admin Reports page: Membership Type Distribution pie chart renders (4 recharts-pie-sector elements)
Admin Reports page: Revenue line chart renders (1 recharts-line element)
Admin Reports page: State distribution horizontal bar chart renders
Admin Email page: SMTP Settings button toggles config panel
Admin Email page: All SMTP fields present (host, port, user, password, from_email)
Admin Email page: Save Settings and Send Test Email buttons present
Admin Members page: Excel export button present
Admin Members page: PDF export button present
Admin Members page: FileUpload zone in Add Member modal for photo
Admin Gallery page: FileUpload zone in Create Album modal for cover image
Admin Events page: 2 FileUpload zones in Add Event modal (brochure + event image)
Admin Publications page: FileUpload zone in Add Publication modal for PDF
Admin Certificates page: 12 PDF download buttons present
Admin Certificates page: Generate Certificate button present
